title: moderation.case_opened / moderation.case_assigned event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.9. Produced by epd2_moderation_service.events.case_state_payload, shared verbatim by build_case_opened_event (moderation.case_opened) and build_case_assigned_event (moderation.case_assigned) - verified by reading events.py, both call the identical payload function. Deliberately excludes opened_by/trigger_type/policy_version (see case_full_state_payload for Audit Core's complete snapshot). assigned_moderator is nullable (null until case_assigned).
